Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “I Know I’m Being Successful When” tool. This is a very important tool with the main
focus of helping you take a step back and find out the activities you are doing on a daily and weekly basis that are flat out wastes of time and not
serving your bigger future or your goals. This is a must for all entrepreneurs and everyone in your group or mastermind.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
List the actions that you spend time on every day or every week.
Decide if that action can be automated, delegated or eliminated.
List the top 3 actions you do that move the needle forward in your life?
List the top 3 things you must eliminate first in your life?
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
